name: Bonnie Canary Bird Food 500g
description: Bonnie Canary food is a mixture of specially selected grains and seeds loved by canaries. The wide variety of ingredients ensures that they get all the required nutrients. Give your canary the nutrition it deserves with Bonnie Canary Bird Food! Specially formulated for optimal health and vitality, this premium blend features a carefully selected mix of seeds and grains, enriched with essential vitamins and minerals. INGREDIENTS: Canary Seed, Canola, Oat, Hemp Seed, Niger Seed, Linseed. Key Features: High-Quality Ingredients: Includes Canola, Oat, canary seed, and nutritious grains, promoting a balanced diet. Vitamins & Minerals: Fortified with vital nutrients to support immune health, feather quality, and overall well-being. Freshness Guaranteed: Packed in a resealable bag to ensure lasting freshness and flavor. Easy to Digest: Designed to be gentle on your bird’s digestive system. FEEDING RECOMMENDATION: Per each bird about 10 gr (1 tablespoon) daily. Canaries eat during most of the time they are awake and should therefore have free access to the fresh feed in a clean bowl. Empty seed coats should be cleaned from the feeding bowl every day. Remember to ensure that birds have free access to the feed and fresh drinking water. Perfect for all canaries, this 500g package is ideal for daily feeding. Treat your feathered friend to the taste and nutrition they love with Bonnie Canary Bird Food!
